subject: chemistry
title: 19M.1.HL.TZ2.36
question_html:
Which compound exists as two configurational isomers?

A. CBr2=CH2

B. CH2=CHBr

C. CHBr2CH2Br

D. CHBr=CHBr
examiners_html: 71 % of the candidates identified 1,2-dibromoethene as having two configurational isomers. The most commonly chosen distractor was C which was the only saturated halogenoalkane, indicating that these candidates may have confused the term with “conformational” isomers.
